name: Instagram
description: Post media, read feeds, and manage comments via Instagram Graph API
author: Robert (Deathwing)

auth.help_text: Requires your own Meta app: go to developers.facebook.com, create an app, add the Instagram product, and paste your App ID above. Add clawdroid://oauth/callback as an allowed redirect URI. No app secret needed — PKCE is used instead.

tools.name: instagram_get_profile
tools.description: Get the authenticated Instagram Business/Creator account profile.

test_cases.name: Get Instagram profile
test_cases.user_prompt: Show me my Instagram profile information

tools.name: instagram_list_media
tools.description: List recent media posts from the account.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of posts to return. Default 10.

test_cases.name: List recent posts
test_cases.user_prompt: Show me my last 5 Instagram posts

tools.name: instagram_get_media
tools.description: Get details of a specific media post.

tools.name: instagram_create_media
tools.description: Create a media container (photo or video) for publishing.

parameters.name: image_url
parameters.description: Public URL of the image (for photo posts)

parameters.name: video_url
parameters.description: Public URL of the video (for video/reel posts)

parameters.name: is_reel
parameters.description: Set to 'true' for Reels. Default false.

tools.name: instagram_publish_media
tools.description: Publish a previously created media container.

tools.name: instagram_list_comments
tools.description: List comments on a media post.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of comments to return. Default 20.

tools.name: instagram_reply_comment
tools.description: Reply to a comment on a media post.

parameters.name: comment_id
parameters.description: The comment ID to reply to

tools.name: instagram_get_insights
tools.description: Get insights/analytics for a media post.

test_cases.name: Get post insights
test_cases.user_prompt: Show me the engagement insights for my Instagram post with ID 12345
